pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","p",null,{"children":["OpenWRT（曾用名 LEDE）是一款广泛应用于路由器的嵌入式操作系统。本站提供 OpenWRT 的包管理器 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"opkg"}]," 的 release 部分镜像。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"部分镜像站（例如 TUNA/BFSU）并不包含 snapshots 镜像，USTC 提供了对 snapshots 的反代，请在替换之前确认各镜像站的情况。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["从 OpenWrt 25.12 开始，包管理器由 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"opkg"}]," 改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apk"}]," (Alpine Package Keeper)，默认软件源的配置文件路径由 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}]," 改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"自动替换","children":"自动替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["对于 OpenWrt 25.12 及以上版本，需选择 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"APK"}],"；对于 OpenWrt 24.10 及以下版本，需选择 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"OPKG"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"执行如下命令自动替换："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"包管理器","items":[["OPKG (OpenWrt ≤ 24.10)",{"config_path":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}],["APK (OpenWrt ≥ 25.12)",{"config_path":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}]]}],"code":"sed -i 's_https\?://downloads.openwrt.org_{{http_protocol}}{{mirror}}_' {{config_path}}","codeLanguage":"sh"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["注：使用 HTTPS 可以有效避免国内运营商的缓存劫持，但需要另行安装 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"libustream-openssl ca-bundle ca-certificates"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"手工替换","children":"手工替换"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["登录到路由器，根据版本或包管理器选择编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apk/repositories.d/distfeeds.list"}]," 或 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/opkg/distfeeds.conf"}]," 文件，将其中的 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http://downloads.openwrt.org"}]," 替换为："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"code":"{{http_protocol}}{{mirror}}"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"即可。"}]]}]

meta.title: OpenWRT 软件仓库镜像使用帮助
